zh.lifeSummary: William de Bromflete於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾布洛普頓 白 薩頓。他於1371年與Ellen de Yarnewek在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁隆德斯波洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1410年在英國英格蘭越可爾隆德斯波洛享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Bromflete于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰越可爾布洛普頓 白 薩頓。他于1371年与Ellen de Yarnewek在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁隆德斯波洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1410年在英国英格兰越可爾隆德斯波洛享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Bromflete was born about 1330, in Brompton by Sawdon, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Ellen de Yarnewek in 1371, in Londesborough, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1410, in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

Il a épousé Ellen de Yarnewek en 1371, à Londesborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1410, à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Bromfleteは約1330年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブロンプトン ビー サウドンで生まれた。1371年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングロンデスボロウでEllen de Yarnewekと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1410年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロンデスボロウで82歳で死去した。

ko.Londesborough, Yorkshire East Riding, En: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 론데스버루그h
ko.Brompton by Sawdon, Yorkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브롬프턴 비 사w던
ko.lifeSummary: William de Bromflete(은)는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브롬프턴 비 사w던에서 태어났다. 그는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 론데스버루그h에서 Ellen de Yarnewek(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Bromflete родился около 1330 г. в местности бромптон би савдон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Yarnewek в 1371 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1410 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
